sanskrit:
गामाविश्य च भूतानि धारयाम्यहमोजसा।
पुष्णामि चौषधीः सर्वाः सोमो भूत्वा रसात्मकः॥
transliteration: gām āviśya ca bhūtāni dhārayāmy aham ojasā | puṣṇāmi cauṣadhīḥ sarvāḥ somo bhūtvā rasātmakaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Entering the earth, I sustain all beings by My power; becoming the moon full of sap, I nourish all plants.
contextual_meaning: Krishna tells Arjuna that the same Intelligence which keeps planets in orbit and vegetables juicy is the Intelligence quietly sustaining every cell of his body and mind.
psychological_state: Autonomic safety: the nervous system registers that an omnipresent regulatory presence removes the burden of having to control everything alone.
trigger_scenario: A client with burnout realizes the same force that keeps the moon circling the earth is also keeping their heartbeat steady without their effort.
anchor_text: The same force that feeds the moon feeds you—trust it.
